content:
{
  "project": "AM Network",
  "tagline": "First blockchain-verified Zakat & Sadaqah platform for 1.8B Muslims",
  "website": "amnetwork.io",
  "founder": "Akbar Amirzoda",
  "stage": "Pre-launch. Beta target Q4 2026",
  "email": "contact@amnetwork.io",
  "repo": "akbaramirov01-star/AMNetwork",
  "branch": "claude/website-review-feedback-Od5gA",
  "stack": "Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS, GitHub Pages, single index.html",
  "blockchain": "Base (primary), Solana (backup), LayerZero cross-chain",
  "revenue_model": "Ujrah (service fee): <$1k=2.5%, $1k-$10k=1.5%, >=10k=1.0%, hardcap 2.5%",
  "sharia": "Wakala bil Ujrah — 100% Zakat to recipients, ujrah on top",
  "colors": {"bg1":"#0A1A11","bg2":"#0F2318","gold":"#C9A84C","green_dark":"#1A5C34","text":"#E8F0EB"},
  "fonts": "DM Sans (body/UI), Cormorant Garamond (headings)",
  "socials": {
    "instagram": "@amnet_io",
    "telegram": "@amnetwork_global",
    "twitter": "@amnet_io",
    "linkedin": "linkedin.com/company/amnetwork-io"
  },
  "languages": ["en","ru","ar","fr","de","es","tr","id"],
  "key_numbers": {
    "zakat_market": "$600B annual",
    "muslims": "1.8B globally",
    "islamic_finance": "$4T market",
    "islamic_fintech_2030": "$57B"
  },
  "products": ["AM Zakat.ai", "AM Academy"],
  "seed_target": "$150k-$500k (ideal $300k)",
  "ga_id": "G-G4GSRVJB5M"
}

{
  "zakat_calculator": {
    "file": "zakat/index.html",
    "deductions": "debts_only — NO monthly expenses (fiqh: only immediately due debts)",
    "nisab": "gold_85g or silver_595g",
    "rate": "2.5%",
    "fiqh_school_notes": "Hanafi: personal jewelry zakatable. Maliki/Shafii/Hanbali: jewelry exempt if for personal use"
  },
  "ai_scoring": {
    "file": "ai_scoring/index.html",
    "score_range": "0-100",
    "worldbank_api": "api.worldbank.org/v2/country/{iso2}/indicator/NY.GNP.PCAP.PP.CD",
    "poverty_lines_ppp": {"low":65,"lmic":111,"umic":208,"high":740},
    "asnaf_categories": 8,
    "languages": "TX dict + tx() function for dynamic strings"
  },
  "smart_contracts": {
    "AMZakatPool.sol": "Directed escrow + oracle release",
    "AMZakatPoolGeneral.sol": "General undirected pool + batch distribution",
    "framework": "Foundry",
    "network": "Base (primary)"
  },
  "i18n": "T object + t() function, 8 languages: en/ru/ar/fr/de/es/tr/id",
  "og_image": "og-image.jpg 1200x630px, circular badge medallion, gold AM + dark green NETWORK",
  "community_section": "2-col compact layout, 4 platform rows (Instagram/Telegram/X/LinkedIn)",
  "removed": ["footer social icons (duplicated community section)", "expenses field from zakat calc"]
}

{
  "implemented": [
    "Islamic 8-pointed star SVG geometric pattern in hero background (gold 7% opacity, repeating 80x80px tile)",
    "numGlow @keyframes: market stat .big elements glow gold when .scard.reveal becomes .visible",
    "Counter animation (animateCount): numbers count from 0 to target using easeOutExpo, 1400ms duration",
    "Stagger reveal: each sibling .reveal card delays by idx*70ms transition",
    "prefers-reduced-motion check: all animations skipped if user has reduced motion preference"
  ],
  "data_attributes_added": {
    ".scard .big[data-t=num_4t]": "data-count=4 data-prefix=$ data-suffix=T",
    ".scard .big[data-t=num_600b]": "data-count=600 data-prefix=$ data-suffix=B",
    ".scard .big[data-t=num_800b]": "data-count=800 data-prefix=$ data-suffix=B",
    ".scard .big[data-t=num_18b]": "data-count=1.8 data-prefix= data-suffix=B",
    ".scard .big[data-t=num_57b]": "data-count=57 data-prefix=$ data-suffix=B"
  },
  "animation_does_not_break_i18n": "Counter ends by restoring el.textContent = finalText (the translated string)"
}

{
  "file": "deck-src/src/App.jsx (React + Framer Motion, builds to deck/)",
  "slides": 14,
  "languages": ["en", "ru"],
  "key_changes_v2": [
    "S5 REPLACED: 'Sadaqah Shield' → 'Sharia Architecture' — ujrah tier cards (2.5%/<$1K, 1.5%/$1K-$10K, 1.0%/≥$10K) + Zero Riba/No Token/No Intermediary badges",
    "S8 UPDATED: Added ujrah tier chips ($1K=2.5%, $1K-$10K=1.5%, ≥$10K=1.0%) below the 1-2.5% headline card",
    "S9 UPDATED: tr5 now includes 'Smart contracts (Foundry)' and 'AI scoring LIVE'",
    "S10 UPDATED: ph1 changed from 'SEED ROUND' to 'SEED — NOW' (June 2026); rd0b includes smart contracts",
    "Cover slide: Islamic 8-pointed star SVG pattern overlay (fade-in with Framer Motion, opacity 0.45)",
    "Typography: H1c uses Cormorant Garamond (matching website); body uses DM Sans",
    "Fonts: Google Fonts @import added to index.css (Cormorant Garamond 400/600/700 + DM Sans 300-700)",
    "App.css: Cleaned up Vite template boilerplate"
  ],
  "build_output": "deck/assets/ (421KB JS, 0.78KB CSS)",
  "navigation": "Arrow keys, scroll wheel, swipe, dot indicators + EN/RU toggle"
}
